UserPromptSubmit.command: bash -c 'PROJECT_DIR="$PWD"; HAS_CLAUDE=$(test -f "$PROJECT_DIR/CLAUDE.md" && echo yes || echo no); HAS_CODE=$(find "$PROJECT_DIR" -maxdepth 2 \( -name "*.py" -o -name "*.ts" \) ! -path "*/node_modules/*" ! -path "*/.venv/*" 2>/dev/null | head -1); HAS_PLACEHOLDER=$(grep -l "{{" "$PROJECT_DIR/CLAUDE.md" 2>/dev/null); IS_BUG=$(echo "$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "fix|bug|broken|error|fail|wrong|crash" | head -1); IS_FEAT=$(echo "$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "add|build|create|implement|new" | head -1); IS_IMPROVE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "improve|refactor|optimize|speed|clean" | head -1); if [ "$HAS_CLAUDE" = "no" ] || [ -n "$HAS_PLACEHOLDER" ]; then echo "[FORGE] NEW_PROJECT — run /setup then /forge"; elif [ -z "$HAS_CODE" ]; then echo "[FORGE] NEW_PROJECT — run /forge for full SDLC"; elif [ -n "$IS_BUG" ]; then echo "[FORGE] BUG_FIX — /investigate first, TDD fix, sync check, /learn"; elif [ -n "$IS_FEAT" ]; then echo "[FORGE] NEW_FEATURE — /specify → /design-doc → /plan-tasks → implement → /gate"; elif [ -n "$IS_IMPROVE" ]; then echo "[FORGE] IMPROVEMENT — analyze → plan → implement → test"; fi; if [ -f "$PROJECT_DIR/SPEC.md" ]; then RC=$(grep -oP "REQ-\d+" "$PROJECT_DIR/SPEC.md" 2>/dev/null | sort -u | wc -l); echo "[FORGE-SYNC] $RC REQs in SPEC. Every code change MUST reference a REQ."; fi'
UserPromptSubmit.description: Detect project state and route to correct Forge flow

PreToolUse.command: echo '[FORGE] BLOCKED: Destructive command needs explicit user approval' && exit 2

bash -c 'if [ -f manage.py ]; then echo "[FORGE] REMIND: Run tests before commit — uv run python manage.py test"; elif [ -f package.json ]; then echo "[FORGE] REMIND: Run tests before commit — npm test"; fi'

PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q "\.py$" 2>/dev/null; then python -m ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; true'

PostToolUse.if: Bash(uv run python manage.py test*|pytest*|npm test*)
PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'echo "[FORGE-SYNC] Tests ran. Check: every [REQ-xxx] has test + code."'
